title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Rackspace India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Rackspace India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Rackspace India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Gwalior operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Rackspace India:
Rackspace India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rackspace India!
